NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND SITE INSPECTION; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HEARING SET FOR DEC-30-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-30-2013 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND SITE INSPECTION; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS MOTION TO COMPEL IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE PLAINTIFF HAS APPEARED FOR DEPOSITION AND THAT PORTION OF THE MOTION HAS BEEN FORMALLY WITHDRAWN. PLAINTIFF AGREED AT THE DEPOSITION TO PROVIDE CERTAIN DOCUMENTS AND SHALL DO SO ON OR BEFORE JANUARY 20, 2014. IF DOCUMENTS ARE NOT PRODUCED THE DEFENDANT MAY RENEW ITS MOTION TO COMPEL. THE PARTIES SHALL MEET AND CONFER WITHIN TEN DAYS FROM SERVICE OF A COPY OF THIS ORDER TO ESTABLISH AN AGREED SITE INSPECTION DATE WHICH SHALL BE NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 14, 2014. IF THE INSPECTION DOES NOT TAKE PLACE ON THE AGREED DATE, DEFENDANT MAY RENEW ITS MOTION. WHILE THERE WERE MULTIPLE COMMUNICATIONS ATTEMPTING TO SCHEDULE THE MULTIPLE PROCEEDINGS REFERENCED IN THE MOTION, IT APPEARS THERE WAS NO SPECIFIC AND FINAL "MEET AND CONFER" COMMUNICATION PRIOR TO THE FILING OF THE MOTION. FOR THAT REASON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM STEVEN STEIN, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. (D302)

(Amended) And Superseding Notice Of Moiton And Motion To Compel Deposition, Production Of Documents, And Site Inspection; Request For Sanctions; Declaration
Off Calendar Dec-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (Amended) And Superseding Notice Of Moiton And Motion To Compel Deposition, Production Of Documents, And Site Inspection; Request For Sanctions is Off calendar. Duplicate entry. Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition, Production Of Documents, And Site Inspection; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Deposition, Production Of Documents, And Site Inspection; Request For Sanctions motion to compel is denied without prejudice. The Plaintiff has appeared for deposition and that portion of the motion has been formally withdrawn. Plaintiff agreed at the deposition to provide certain documents and shall do so on or before January 20, 2014. If documents are not produced the Defendant may renew its motion to compel. The parties shall meet and confer within ten days from service of a copy of this Order to establish an agreed site inspection date which shall be no later than February 14, 2014. If the inspection does not take place on the agreed date, Defendant may renew its motion. While there were multiple communications attempting to schedule the multiple proceedings referenced in the motion, it appears there was no specific and final "meet and confer" communication prior to the filing of the motion. For that reason Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
